prompt: 1. Design a modern tech-style poster for an "AI Agent tool launch," vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, with a clear and eye-catching main title and a subtitle explaining product value. Use a black, white, and gray color palette with fluorescent green accents. Include abstract networks, code windows, and agent nodes. The overall look should resemble a high-end SaaS launch poster, and text must be accurate and readable. 2. Generate a cover image suitable for an X/Twitter long-form post titled "2026 AI Tool Trends," horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, with a clean and sophisticated style. Include the title and 3 keywords: Agent / Workflow / Automation. The background should be a combination of desktop workflows, browsers, terminals, and data panels, with a layout like a tech media header. 3. Generate an advertisement for a Web3 wallet security tool. The center of the image shows a phone displaying the wallet interface, surrounded by on-chain addresses, risk alerts, shield icons, and transaction path visualizations. The style should be professional and trustworthy, with the Chinese title: "Making every on-chain operation safer." 4. Create a Chinese infographic titled "The 5 Layers of AI Agent Capabilities," including: understanding tasks, calling tools, reading data, executing operations, and reviewing/optimizing. Show this in a clear hierarchical structure, each layer with a small icon, white background, and tech-blue accents. 5. Generate a one-page 4-panel comic strip about a creator going from manually searching for info, writing copy, and making images to completing the workflow automatically with an AI Agent. The style should be lighthearted and humorous, with consistent characters and short, clear Chinese dialogue. The last panel should highlight "double the efficiency." 6. Generate a roadmap visual for an AI x Crypto project, including three phases: Q2, Q3, and Q4: MVP, Agent Marketplace, and Onchain Automation. The style should look like a product page in a funding deck—clean, credible, futuristic, and with clearly readable text.
